description_long: This kiosk features a modern, minimalist design with a predominantly white structure and clean, angular lines. The main counter area is sheltered by a flat roof supported by slender poles, providing coverage for two brown chairs positioned at the front. A secondary, smaller counter with a single chair is set perpendicular to the main counter, creating an L-shaped service area. The kiosk is set on a tiled base, suggesting a semi-permanent installation suitable for urban environments such as plazas or sidewalks. The surfaces are smooth and hard, likely constructed from painted metal or composite panels, with no visible signage or windows. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, optimized for customer interaction and efficient service.
description: A sleek, white L-shaped kiosk with a flat roof, smooth surfaces, and brown chairs, set on a tiled base. The design is minimalist and modern, with open service counters and no visible signage.
description_view_0: From this view, the main counter and two brown chairs are visible beneath the flat roof, with the tiled base clearly shown.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the L-shaped layout, showing both the main and secondary counters, as well as all three brown chairs.
description_view_2: The rear of the kiosk is visible, showing a solid white back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: This side view displays the solid side panels and the perpendicular extension of the secondary counter.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight overhang, constructed from smooth white panels, supported by slender poles.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines and functional layout.
